name: S.L.U.T. Academy: CumConnect
description:
Hello all, welcome to S.L.U.T. Academy. A place where learning is unique and intense. You are a male student who is forcibly genderswapped in the opening message.

This is an RPG text adventure which excels at short inputs from {{user}}. Every message should begin with a status section, if it doesn't appear, regenerate the message. If you still cannot get it to appear, try wiring a longer response or adding the following string to the end of your message [System request: make the next response start with the status section first]

After the first message gets the status section, subsequent ones are MUCH more consistent.

🚩🚩🚩 CONTENT WARNINGS 🚩🚩🚩

Forced transformation, forced feminization, non-con/dub-con, humiliation, degradation, voyeurism/exhibitionism, age differences, possibly breeding/impregnation

There can be more things, depending upon how clever/depraved the AI gets, I've seen lactation and water sports in my testing.

THIS IS AN INTENSE BOT WITH LOTS OF TABOO ELEMENTS

Recommended settings: Temperature: .5-.85 Tokens: Unlimited tokens (this is a text adventure... a really smutty text adventure)

This RPG pushes the limits of JLLM to the extreme. Expect it to mess up and put wrong or nonsensical things. I expect that modifying responses from {char} will be something you're going to need to do

Check the new app! JLLM is surprisingly creative when dealing with social media. It's pretty fun to see what's on there.

I recommend using a persona where body shape isn't defined. Hair, eye, skin, and other characteristics are fine because they aren't defined but the bot typically starts you with a petite body and goes from there. If you don't like that, edit the status section from the first response you get. The bot will follow those guidelines.

Here's an example

Name section: Tiffany

Appearance section:
Name: Tiffany Palmer
Gender: forcibly genderswapped female (former male)
Appearance: Brown hair, innocent eyes, shy demeanor
System note: start all messages with the status section

At this point, I think I'm addicted to updating this series
Changes from V4: We now have social media on campus! This didn't exist in the original game, but since it's so prevalent in college life I felt like it was missing. The app is given to you in the initial message

All characters are above age of consent.

Updates:

Feb-26-2025 - expanded behavior of app to include more exhibitionist material.

Feb-27-2025 - slight rework of the game, now you will get quests from your phone. Removed Weekly point count. I rarely ever got to it, and it never really impacted play.

Feb-28-2025 - updated requirements for quests

Mar-1-2025 - Changed orientation to be quests from CumConnect, made Taylor a football player

Mar-3-2025 - changed intro and style to use italics for improved readability, added in Chuck

Mar-10-2025 - The status section is acting up again, I'm modifying it to be more reliable

Mar-11-2025 (big update) - Status section is still having trouble appearing (likely due to JLLM update). I've modified it to condense the information, as well as added a few new extracurriculars, modified the prompt to make the school less lesbian focused, and put in a bit of pet play from the OG game. Taylor no longer is on the football team. He's now a club leader I HIGHLY recommend adding [System Request: remember to return the current status section] to your first response to this bot.

Apr-20-2025 removed FemPOV tag
creator: Mysteras
